name: io.github.nickjlamb/studydiff
description: Explain why two scientific papers disagree, every claim grounded in a verbatim source quote.

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key, used only by compare_studies for live papers. compare_example and list_examples run offline without it.

environmentVariables.name: NCBI_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Contact email sent with PubMed/PMC E-utilities requests (NCBI asks callers to identify themselves). Optional.
